title: Wings of the Morning
writer: Dorothea Donn-Byrne, Thomas J. Geraghty, John Meehan
plot: In 1889, A gypsy princess, Young Marie (Annabella), loses her aristocratic husband after his is killed in an accident. Nearly a half-century later, her granddaughter Maria (Annabella) falls in love with a Canadian horse trainer, K...
